chapter_title.en: The Virtue of Mosques, Their Sanctity and the Reward for Those Who Pray in Them

text: 704 - وَقَالَ أَبُو عُبَيْدَةَ اَلْحَذَّاءُ: وَ مَرَّ بِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ أَنَا بَيْنَ مَكَّةَ وَ اَلْمَدِينَةِ أَضَعُ اَلْأَحْجَارَ فَقُلْتُ هَذَا مِنْ ذَاكَ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.704 - Abu Ubaidah Al-Hadha’ said:
"Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) passed by me while I was between Makkah and Madinah placing stones. I asked: 'Is this from that?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.'"
